qualities.rubric: Did the player obtain the key?

steps.eval: const ctx=SillyTavern.getContext(); const t=ctx.substituteParams('{{story_title}}'); if(t!=='Plan 13 Surfacing') throw new Error('story_title='+t);
const ctx=SillyTavern.getContext(); const c=ctx.substituteParams('{{story_current_checkpoint}}'); if(!c.includes('Gate')||!c.includes('sanctum')) throw new Error('story_current_checkpoint='+c);

const ctx=SillyTavern.getContext(); const p=ctx.substituteParams('{{story_possible_transitions}}'); if(!p.includes('Sanctum')||!p.includes('has_key')) throw new Error('story_possible_transitions='+p);
const ctx=SillyTavern.getContext(); const r=ctx.substituteParams('{{story_role_arin}}'); if(r!=='Arin') throw new Error('story_role_arin='+r);

const rt=globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime; if(typeof rt.getAwayRecap!=='function') throw new Error('getAwayRecap missing'); if(rt.getAwayRecap()!==null) throw new Error('unexpected pending recap on fresh import');
const rt=globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime; const pt=rt.getPossibleTransitions(); if(!Array.isArray(pt)||pt.length!==1) throw new Error('getPossibleTransitions='+JSON.stringify(pt));

steps.extract: MEMORY type=fact importance=2 expiration=permanent text="The sanctum key hangs by the gate." evidence="the key by the gate"

steps.eval: const rt=globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime; const entry=rt.getSnapshot().memory.entries.find(e=>e.text.includes('sanctum key')); if(!entry) throw new Error('seeded entry missing'); globalThis.__p13memId=entry.id;
const rt=globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime; const entry=rt.getSnapshot().memory.entries.find(e=>e.id===globalThis.__p13memId); if(!entry?.pinned) throw new Error('entry not pinned via /so-mem');

const rt=globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime; if(rt.getSnapshot().memory.entries.some(e=>e.id===globalThis.__p13memId)) throw new Error('entry not excluded via /so-mem'); delete globalThis.__p13memId;

const rt=globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime; rt.capturePayload('scenario'); const c=rt.getPayloadCaptures(); if(!c.length||c[0].reason!=='scenario') throw new Error('payload capture failed: '+JSON.stringify(c[0]??null));
